title: From Cat Litter To Art Piece - Pottery Without A Kiln - 2 - the recipe
description:
If you want to have a look at those special videos become a member and join by clicking this link https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join
The recipe is 

600g clay
120g sodium silicate
500g magnesium dioxide added in
100g Magnesium dioxide for mixing preocess
this is really a geopolymer
